experience.title: Experience

highlights: SaaS EdTech platform with modules, REST endpoints and multi-tenant isolation via PostgreSQL schemas for different municipalities.
Admin dashboard with Editor.js, FullCalendar, RBAC (teacher → admin) and forms validated with React Hook Form + Zod.
Offline-first Expo app; automated deploys to 2 production VPS via GitHub Actions with self-hosted runners.
SaaS EdTech platform with modules, REST endpoints and multi-tenant isolation via PostgreSQL schemas for different municipalities.
Admin dashboard with Editor.js, FullCalendar, RBAC (teacher → admin) and forms validated with React Hook Form + Zod.
Offline-first Expo app; automated deploys to 2 production VPS via GitHub Actions with self-hosted runners.
Delivered 3+ websites/portfolios (Next.js, Angular) with authentication, admin panels and Docker/Nginx deploys.
Prisma + PostgreSQL persistence, Framer Motion animations, SEO/GTM and testing with Jest/Vitest.
Full cycle from briefing to remote deploy, working directly with clients.
